# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Write a Docker Compose file for ELK Stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana) and APM Server. Configure all services with network settings. Set up communication between components.
# Category: monitoring_misconfiguration

version: '3'

  services:
    elk-app1:
      image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:7.5.0
      ports:
        - 9200:9200
      volumes: 
        - './elasticsearch:/usr/share/elasticsearch/data'
        - ./esconfig.yml:/usr/share/elasticsearch/config/elasticsearch.yml
      environment:
        - node.name=elk-app1
        - cluster.name=elk_cluster
        - bootstrap.memory_lock=true
        - "ES_JAVA_OPTS=-Xms50m -Xmx50m"
    elk-logstash:
      image: docker.elastic.co/logstash/logstash:7.5.0
      volumes: 
        - ./logstash:/usr/share/logstash/pipeline
        - ./logstashconfig.conf:/usr/share/logstash/config/logstash.yml
        - /var/log/elk:/var/log/elk
        - ./beats-input:/usr/share/logstash/files/inputs
      environment: 
        - beats.monitoring.enabled=true
    elk-kibana:
      image: docker.elastic.co/kibana/kibana:7.5.0
      ports:
        - 9100:9100
    elk-apmserver:
      image: newrelic/java-agent
      ports: 
        - 3268:3268
        - 4755:4755
      environment: 
        - JAVA_OPTS='-javaagent:/newrelic.jar'
